steps.title: Identify the pivotal contrast
steps.content: The turning point is “But while...” — it introduces both the work's value (comprehensive, unique resource) and its limitation (lacks authorial perspective to unite accounts). The main idea must address both elements.

steps.title: Match the two-part structure
steps.content: D captures this exactly: a worthwhile attempt at thorough history with an important limitation. A, B, and C either introduce unsupported claims (TV-vs.-film split, non-participation) or misidentify what the limitation is. That matches choice D — D is correct.
